title: Cohere Model
description: Represents a Cohere model with its capabilities, supported endpoints, context length, and configuration details.

name.description: The unique name of the model for use in API requests.

endpoints.description: The API endpoints the model is compatible with.

context_length.description: The maximum number of tokens the model can process in a single request.

tokenizer_url.description: The URL for the model's tokenizer configuration file.

default_endpoints.description: The API endpoints for which this model is the default selection.

finetuned.description: Indicates whether the model is a fine-tuned variant of a base model.

ModelFamily.description: The family of Cohere models that a specific model belongs to.
